# iproute_fou (Resource)

Manages a Foo-over-UDP (FOU) receive port (ip fou).

## Example Usage

```terraform
# FOU direct mode (Foo-over-UDP)
resource "iproute_fou" "direct" {
  port     = 5555
  protocol = 4 # IPIP
}

# GUE mode (Generic UDP Encapsulation)
resource "iproute_fou" "gue" {
  port       = 6666
  encap_type = "gue"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `port` (Number) UDP port number.

### Optional

- `encap_type` (String) Encapsulation type: direct or gue.
- `family` (String) Address family.
- `local` (String) Local address.
- `peer` (String) Peer address.
- `protocol` (Number) IP protocol number.
- `remote_port` (Number) Remote port.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
